paragraphs: I'm currently a Bachelor's student at the University of Washington, specializing in Data Science under the iSchool, with a second degree in Economics. My primary interests lie in Software and Data Engineering, with a growing focus on the intersection of Machine Learning and economic applications.

segments.text: Outside the classroom, I'm the incoming director at
, a platform helping students connect over shared meals. I also contribute to the Software Engineering Career Club, building tools and community through an in house Resume Review platform,
and other projects to support students in becoming better engineers.
, an AI badminton coach using computer vision and the latest language models to give you actionable feedback.

education.degree: B.S. Informatics: Data Science + B.A. Economics (GPA: 3.66)

experience.summary: Leading student connectivity and a shared meal platform for the UW community.
bullets: Connected over 550 students through shared meals @The University of Washington.

experience.summary: Developed highly accurate ML models for flight delay prediction and operations optimizations.
bullets: Developed models to predict flight delay accuracy for 600,000+ rows and 90+ features with an 80% R².
Enhanced model prediction by 8% by performing EDA on 50+ numerical features.
Performed Experiments on 3 weather APIs to find the data optimal for the model.
Optimized operational efficiency by 3% through a PuLP-based linear programming optimizer in Python.
Achieved 30% improvement in sentiment analysis accuracy by testing 3 prompting techniques on Amazon Bedrock.

experience.summary: Mentoring 35+ students in open-source development and improving job search platforms.
bullets: Led SWECC Labs, mentoring 35+ students to open-source development for career growth.
Improved the job search process for 2000+ aspiring software engineers by developing and enhancing platforms across 38+ repositories.

experience.summary: Led a cross-functional team of 6 developers in building cross-platform engagement features.
bullets: Led a team of 6 developers for a student-led startup by enhancing engagement for 500+ users.
Added 30 users by redeveloping the website, app availability selection, and developing a community Discord bot.

Reduced code review time by 20% through hands-on workshops and feedback sessions, mentoring 20+ developers in React Native(Expo), Git, and Google Cloud Platform for a cross functional developmental cohort of 35.

experience.summary: Developed media galleries, integrated Firebase, and scaled the app by minimizing load.
bullets: Enhanced media management by developing a photo gallery using React Native and Expo Image Picker.
Integrated Firebase for seamless image storage and retrieval, optimizing app performance and user interaction.
Scaled the app to 400+ users by enhancing core functionality through batch processing and load reduction.
Resolved 35+ bugs and 8+ critical issues, improving app stability and user experience.

projects.title: Mesocosm
projects.summary: Python CLI for scaffolding, submitting, and running reproducible sandbox environments for AI agents, with exportable replay data for showcases.

projects.title: IsoCourt
projects.summary: AI badminton coach that analyzes uploaded footage with action recognition and pose estimation to deliver stroke breakdowns and personalized technical feedback.
